text: Migrate every route and file from the Pages Router to the Next.js App Router. When finished, remove the pages dir entirely. Ensure the proper App Router APIs are used. If a Pages Router API was used that no longer exists in App Router, replace it with the newer version or the new pattern. Make sure to add types.
I’m going to inspect the Next.js project structure first so I can map every `pages` route and Pages Router API usage before moving anything to `app` and removing `pages`.

text: The migration builds cleanly. I’m doing one final pass over the generated config change and the diff so I can report exactly what moved and note any behavioral shifts from the old router model.

text:
Migrated the project fully to the App Router and removed `pages` entirely. The main replacements are `app/layout.tsx` for `_app` and `_document`, `app/not-found.tsx` for `404`, `app/global-error.tsx` for `_error`, server component pages in [`app/page.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx), [`app/blog/page.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/page.tsx), and [`app/blog/[id]/page.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx), plus route handlers in [`app/api/posts/route.ts`](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/route.ts) and [`app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts`](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts).

I also replaced Pages Router APIs with App Router patterns:
- `getServerSideProps` -> server component + `headers()`
- `getStaticProps` / ISR -> server `fetch(..., { next: { revalidate } })`
- `getStaticPaths` -> `generateStaticParams`
- `next/head` -> `metadata` / `generateMetadata`
- `next/router` -> `next/navigation` in small client components
- API `req/res` handlers -> typed `NextResponse` route handlers

Types were added across the migration, including typed shared models in [`lib/blog.ts`](/home/user/workspace/lib/blog.ts), [`lib/api.ts`](/home/user/workspace/lib/api.ts), and a typed provider in [`components/AppProvider.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.tsx).

Validation passed with `npm run build`. Next also auto-updated [`tsconfig.json`](/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json) to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts`.
